title: 3pk Universal Tool Work Gloves Adult Outdoor Home Gardening Heavy Duty Accessory
description:
Protect your hands while working in your garden with the 3pk of Universal Tool Work Gloves. Everyone should have a pair of durable work gloves for gardening, yard work, crafts, home repairs and other general maintenance work. The Universal Tool Work Gloves feature thick leather palms to help prevent blisters and protect against splinters, cuts, scrapes, and poisonous plants. The rest of the glove is made of tough, breathable material that ensures comfort regardless of weather conditions.
